untranslatable_reason: Signal requires z-score calculation (yport - movingAvg) / movingStd for position sizing, which requires dynamic volatility-adjusted scaling not available in standard indicator set. Also requires cointegration half-life parameter determination and 'lookback_period' calculation from preceding analysis. Position size scaling inversely proportional to z-score deviation cannot be expressed as binary entry/exit conditions using allowed operators.
translation_notes: Approximated mean reversion logic using price crossings of SMA_20 as a proxy for moving average deviation. True implementation requires: (1) custom z-score indicator for dynamic position sizing, (2) half-life from cointegration analysis, (3) volatility-adjusted position scaling. The 'CONTEXT_DEPENDENT' direction indicates long/short based on price position relative to MA, which has been translated as separate entry conditions for each direction. Actual numUnits scaling cannot be captured in this schema.
